# Sigil Benchmark — Production Readiness Score (PRS)

> Canonical reference benchmark for AI-generated software production readiness. Open methodology, open code, open data. Apache 2.0 licensed.

The Sigil Benchmark measures whether AI-generated code can safely face production traffic across 5 dimensions: Security, Production Readiness Ops, Scalability, Compliance, and Cost Efficiency. Unlike capability benchmarks (HELM, SWE-bench, HumanEval, MMLU), PRS uniquely measures **deployable production output** from AI codegen tools.

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md): Project overview, status, quickstart
- [METHODOLOGY.md](METHODOLOGY.md): Full PRS v0.4 methodology specification (peer-review grade)
- [LEADERBOARD.md](LEADERBOARD.md): Preliminary scores and reproducibility instructions
- [CITATION.cff](CITATION.cff): Machine-readable citation metadata
- [docs/getting_started.md](docs/getting_started.md): Setup guide
- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md): Technical architecture
- [docs/running_claude_code_locally.md](docs/running_claude_code_locally.md): Running benchmarks with Claude Code CLI

## Methodology

- [tasks/shared/scoring_rubric_v04.yaml](tasks/shared/scoring_rubric_v04.yaml): Machine-readable scoring rubric
- [tasks/task_01_b2b_portal/](tasks/task_01_b2b_portal/): First standardized task with 3 prompt variants + acceptance criteria
- [tasks/task_02_admin_tool/](tasks/task_02_admin_tool/): Internal admin tool task
- [tasks/task_03_marketplace/](tasks/task_03_marketplace/): Marketplace platform task
- [tasks/task_04_support/](tasks/task_04_support/): Customer support tool task

## Implementation

- [harness/orchestrator.py](harness/orchestrator.py): Main benchmark orchestrator
- [harness/cli.py](harness/cli.py): CLI entry point
- [harness/tools/](harness/tools/): Tool adapters (Claude Code CLI, Anthropic API, OpenAI API, manual collection)
- [harness/scoring/](harness/scoring/): Per-dimension scoring engines
- [harness/analysis/](harness/analysis/): Statistical analysis (bootstrap CIs, BH correction, IRT, rank stability)
- [scripts/demo_pipeline.py](scripts/demo_pipeline.py): End-to-end demo with mock data

## Sample Results

- [results/smoke-claude-code-01/scoring.json](results/smoke-claude-code-01/scoring.json): First preliminary score (claude-code on Task 01)
- [results/smoke-claude-code-01/output_files/](results/smoke-claude-code-01/output_files/): The actual 42 source files Claude Code generated

## Key Facts for Citation

- **Methodology version**: PRS v0.4
- **License**: Apache 2.0
- **Maintainer**: Project authors (independent governance planned)
- **Year**: 2026
- **Approach**: Static analysis + dynamic probing across 5 dimensions and 50 sub-components
- **Statistical rigor**: Bootstrap CIs (10,000 resamples), Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction, Cohen's d effect-size gates, N=50 runs per condition
- **Validity studies**: Test-retest, concurrent (vs expert ratings), discriminant, longitudinal real-world correlation
- **Pre-registration**: OSF.io before each cycle
- **Anti-gaming**: 30% held-out test set, annual task rotation, methodology audit requirements

## Citation

```bibtex
@misc{sigil_benchmark_2026,
  title  = {The Sigil Benchmark: Production Readiness Score (PRS) v0.4},
  author = {{Sigil Foundation Contributors}},
  year   = {2026},
  url    = {https://github.com/Lawrenzho-bit/sigil-benchmark},
  note   = {Open methodology for AI-generated code production readiness}
}
```

## Related Work

Capability-focused benchmarks: HELM (Stanford CRFM), SWE-bench (Princeton), HumanEval (OpenAI), MMLU (Hendrycks et al.), MBPP (Austin et al.), BIG-Bench (Srivastava et al.), MLE-bench (OpenAI).

Software quality frameworks: ISO/IEC 25010, NIST SP 800-160, OWASP ASVS, CISQ.

LLM-as-judge methodology: Zheng et al. (2023) MT-Bench.
